steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line of best fit
steps.content: Trace the line of best fit from lower-left to upper-right. The line passes through approximately \((0, 0)\) and \((10, 15)\), which are easy reference points at the edges of the data.

steps.title: Calculate the slope using rise over run
Select the closest answer choice
steps.content:
Compare 1.5 to each option:
  • A) 0.2 — difference of 1.3; far too small. Incorrect.
  • B) 0.7 — difference of 0.8; still too small. Incorrect.
  • C) 1.8 — difference of 0.3; closest to 1.5. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • D) 2.6 — difference of 1.1; too large. Incorrect.
